title: LearnerProgress
description: A learner's progress on one module, plus derived readiness signals. Tracks demonstrated understanding, not page views. Mirrors the fields in 22-study-plans/progress-tracker.md.

lesson_status.description: Self- or system-assessed status for the module.

interview_readiness_score.description: Derived from spoken-rubric results across interview practice.

weak_tags.description: Theme tags the learner repeatedly scores low on; drives revision routing.

next_recommended_lesson.description: Path or id of the next lesson to open.

revision_due_at.description: When spaced revision of this module is next due.

readiness_flag.description: True when the readiness checklist in the progress tracker is fully met for this module.
